title: Photographing Nepal’s wildlife for the world - Nepali Times
description: Photographing Nepal’s wildlife for the world  Nepali Times
publisher.title: Nepali Times
full_article:
Noted Nepali conservation photographer Om Prakash Yadav's dramatic portrait of a tiger looking directly at the camera has been selected for the cover of the June 2026 edition of BBC Wildlife Magazine in the UK.

Yadav is a wildlife and conservation photographer whose work focuses on endangered species, natural habitats, and the relationship between people and the environment. Over the years, he has documented wildlife across Nepal’s national parks, wetlands, grasslands, forests and mountain landscapes, working at the intersection of photography, conservation, education, and storytelling.

The photograph of the Royal Bengal Tiger was taken in Meghauli just outside Chitwan National Park in November last year and was selected for ‘the tiger’s direct eye contact, strong detail, and natural forest setting’.

“Tigers are difficult to spot, but I came upon this one during an unexpected forest encounter in the buffer zone,” Yadav recalls. “It appeared quietly and briefly, creating only a short window to photograph the animal before it disappeared back into the undergrowth. ”

He added: “The moment was not a dramatic chase or planned shoot, but a reminder of how unpredictable and humbling wildlife photography can be. Meaningful nature photographs come from patience, field knowledge, and respect for the natural rhythm of the forest rather than aggressive pursuit.”

The June 2026 issue of BBC Wildlife Magazine features the BBC series Tiger Island, and the editorial team selected Yadav’s image for the cover after reviewing a curated selection of tiger photographs from Nepal.

Photos: OM PRAKASH YADAV

Yadav sees the cover slection as more than just a personal milestone, but an opportunity for Nepal’s wildlife and protected areas to receive wider international attention through photography.

Interestingly, Yadav’s career started out neither as a conservationist nor a photographer. He originally worked in information technology, graphic design, and digital media, but he took photographs as a hobby that he pursued during his travels or free time.

Over time, repeated visits to Nepal’s national parks and natural landscapes gradually shifted his focus to specialise in wildlife and conservation photography. Encounters with birds, mammals, reptiles, and forest ecosystems led him to spend more time in the field documenting species, and observing animal behaviour rather than simply photographing landscapes or travel scenes.

“For me photography became a way to communicate environmental stories and create awareness about conservation issues in Nepal,” Yadav told us from Manang last week, while photographing Himalayan birds. Eventually, he moved into biodiversity education outreach, conducting workshops, and conservation-oriented visual storytelling.

“Wildlife photography is built far more on patience, observation, and understanding animal behaviour than on equipment and technique alone,” said Yadav, pointing out that wild tigers ware notoriously difficult to photograph because it requires long hours in the field, repeated visits to the same habitats, and acceptance that many days may pass without any meaningful encounters.

“Weather, light, terrain, and the movement patterns of animals all influence the outcome, and often the most important part of wildlife photography is learning when not to disturb the environment,” he said.

Tiger photography in particular demands discipline and respect for the animal and knowledge of its behaviour, and most encounters are brief and unpredictable. Photographers may spend weeks searching forests and riverbeds for signs such as pugmarks, alarm calls, or scent markings, only to have a few seconds to react when a tiger finally appears.

For Om Prakash Yadav, ethical practice is equally important. Maintaining distance, avoiding disturbance, and prioritising the welfare of the animal always come before getting a photograph. Besides tigers, Yadav has photographed many of Nepal’s lesser-known wildlife species, including birds, reptiles, wetland animals, and mammals from the country’s diverse ecosystems.

In 2010, 12 tiger range countries met in St Petersburg, pledging to double their tiger populations in ten years. Nepal did not just double its numbers, but more than tripled them by 2026 — the only country to do so.

He added: “Nepal holds enormous potential for wildlife storytelling and conservation communication at an international level. It is not just about saving iconic species for the future but also to the wider ecosystems that support them. This encourages people to protect nature and this in turn ensures human livelihoods.”

Equipment Om Yadav uses:

Nikon Z9 Nikon D810

For wildlife

Nikkor 180-600mm Z

Nikkor 80-400mm VRII

For travel and landscape;

Nikkor Z 24-120mm f/4 S

Nikkor 20mm f/1.8 G

Nikkor 16mm f/2.8 D
translated:
विख्यात नेपाली संरक्षण फोटोग्राफर ओम प्रकाश यादव द्वारा सीधा कैमरा दिस देखैत बाघ के नाटकीय चित्र के यूके में बीबीसी वाइल्डलाइफ पत्रिका के जून 2026 के संस्करण के कवर के लेल चुनल गेल अछि.

यादव वन्यजीव आरू संरक्षण के फोटोग्राफर छै, जेकरऽ काम विलुप्त होय रहलऽ प्रजाति, प्राकृतिक आवास, आरू लोगऽ आरू पर्यावरण के बीच के संबंध प॑ केंद्रित छै । वर्षो स॑ नेपाल केरऽ राष्ट्रीय उद्यान, आर्द्रभूमि, घास के मैदान, जंगल आरू पहाड़ी परिदृश्य म॑ वन्यजीवऽ के दस्तावेजीकरण करी क॑ फोटोग्राफी, संरक्षण, शिक्षा, आरू कहानी के चौराहा प॑ काम करी रहलऽ छै ।

रॉयल बंगाल टाइगर केरऽ फोटो पिछला साल नवंबर म॑ चितवन नेशनल पार्क के ठीक बाहर मेघौली म॑ लेलऽ गेलऽ छेलै आरू एकरा ‘बाघ केरऽ सीधा आँखऽ स॑ संपर्क, मजबूत विस्तार, आरू प्राकृतिक वन सेटिंग’ लेली चुनलऽ गेलऽ छेलै ।

यादव स्मरण करैत कहैत छथि जे बाघ कए देखब मुश्किल अछि, मुदा बफर जोन मे अप्रत्याशित वन मुठभेड़ क दौरान एहि पर हमरा नजरि आयल। “ई चुपचाप आ संक्षेप मे प्रकट भेल, जाहि सँ जानवरक फोटो खिचबाक लेल मात्र एकटा छोट सन खिड़की बनल, ताहि सँ पहिने जे ओ फेर सँ नीचाँक गाछ मे गायब भ’ गेल।”

हुनी आरू कहलकै, "ई क्षण कोनो नाटकीय पीछा या योजनाबद्ध शूट नै छेलै, बल्कि ई याद दिलाबै छेलै कि वन्यजीव फोटोग्राफी कतेक अप्रत्याशित आरू विनम्र होय सकै छै। सार्थक प्रकृति फोटोग्राफ आक्रामक पीछा करै के बजाय धैर्य, मैदान के ज्ञान, आरू जंगल के प्राकृतिक लय के सम्मान स॑ मिलै छै।"

बीबीसी वाइल्डलाइफ पत्रिका केरऽ जून २०२६ अंक म॑ बीबीसी केरऽ धारावाहिक टाइगर आइलैंड केरऽ विशेषता छै, आरू संपादकीय टीम न॑ नेपाल केरऽ बाघ केरऽ फोटो केरऽ क्यूरेट चयन के समीक्षा करला के बाद यादव केरऽ छवि क॑ कवर लेली चुनलकै ।

फोटो : ॐ प्रकाश यादव

यादव कवर चयन क॑ खाली एगो व्यक्तिगत मील के पत्थर स॑ जादा मान॑ छै, बल्कि नेपाल केरऽ वन्यजीव आरू संरक्षित क्षेत्र लेली फोटोग्राफी के माध्यम स॑ व्यापक अंतर्राष्ट्रीय ध्यान मिलै के अवसर मान॑ छै ।

मजेदार बात ई जे यादव के कैरियर के शुरुआत ने संरक्षणवादी के रूप में भेल छल आ ने फोटोग्राफर के रूप में. ओ मूल रूप स सूचना प्रौद्योगिकी, ग्राफिक डिजाइन, आ डिजिटल मीडिया मे काज करैत छलाह, मुदा ओ एकटा शौक क रूप मे फोटो खिंचबैत छलाह जे ओ अपन यात्रा या खाली समय मे करैत छलाह ।

समय के साथ नेपाल के राष्ट्रीय उद्यान आरू प्राकृतिक परिदृश्य के बार-बार दौरा धीरे-धीरे हुनकऽ ध्यान वन्यजीव आरू संरक्षण फोटोग्राफी म॑ विशेषज्ञता लेली बदली देलकै । पक्षी, स्तनधारी, सरीसृप, आरू वन पारिस्थितिकी तंत्र के साथ मुठभेड़ के कारण हुनका खाली परिदृश्य या यात्रा के दृश्य के फोटोग्राफी करै के बजाय प्रजाति के दस्तावेजीकरण में, आरू जानवरऽ के व्यवहार के अवलोकन करै में खेत में अधिक समय बिताबै के कारण बनलै ।

यादव पिछला सप्ताह हिमालयी चिड़ै के फोटोग्राफी के दौरान मनांग स हमरा सब के कहलनि जे, हमरा लेल फोटोग्राफी पर्यावरण के कहानी के संप्रेषण आ नेपाल में संरक्षण के मुद्दा के प्रति जागरूकता पैदा करय के तरीका बनि गेल। अंततः, ओ जैव विविधता शिक्षा आउटरीच, कार्यशाला के संचालन, आ संरक्षण-उन्मुख दृश्य कथा कहब में आबि गेलाह.

यादव नँ कहलकै, “वन्यजीव फोटोग्राफी केवल उपकरण आरू तकनीक स॑ कहीं अधिक धैर्य, अवलोकन आरू जानवरऽ के व्यवहार क॑ समझै प॑ बनलऽ छै ।

हुनी कहलकै, “मौसम, रोशनी, इलाका, आरू जानवरऽ के आवाजाही के पैटर्न सब परिणाम क॑ प्रभावित करै छै, आरू अक्सर वन्यजीव फोटोग्राफी केरऽ सबस॑ महत्वपूर्ण हिस्सा ई सीखना छै कि पर्यावरण क॑ कखनी परेशान नै करलऽ जाय ।

विशेष रूप स॑ बाघ फोटोग्राफी म॑ जानवर के प्रति अनुशासन आरू सम्मान आरू ओकरऽ व्यवहार के जानकारी के मांग करलऽ जाय छै, आरू अधिकांश मुठभेड़ संक्षिप्त आरू अप्रत्याशित होय छै । फोटोग्राफर हफ्ता भर जंगल आरू नदी के तल पर पगमार्क, अलार्म कॉल, या गंध के निशान जैसनऽ संकेत खोजै म॑ बिता सकै छै, केवल कुछ सेकंड के समय मिल॑ सकै छै कि जब॑ अंततः बाघ आबी जाय छै त॑ ओकरा प्रतिक्रिया देलऽ जाय ।

ओम प्रकाश यादव के लेल नैतिक अभ्यास सेहो ओतबे महत्वपूर्ण अछि | दूरी बना क रखनाय, गड़बड़ी सं बचनाय, आ जानवर कें कल्याण कें प्राथमिकता देनाय हमेशा फोटो लेवा सं पहिले आबै छै. बाघ के अलावा यादव न॑ देश केरऽ विविध पारिस्थितिकी तंत्र केरऽ पक्षी, सरीसृप, आर्द्रभूमि केरऽ जानवर, आरू स्तनधारी सहित नेपाल केरऽ बहुत कम ज्ञात वन्यजीव प्रजाति के फोटो खींचन॑ छै ।

2010 म॑ सेंट पीटर्सबर्ग म॑ 12 टाइगर रेंज देशऽ के बैठक छेलै, जेकरा म॑ दस साल म॑ अपनऽ बाघऽ के आबादी क॑ दोगुना करै के वादा करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै । नेपाल न॑ अपनऽ संख्या क॑ खाली दुगुना नै करलकै, बल्कि २०२६ तलक तीन गुना स॑ भी अधिक करी देलकै — एकमात्र देश जे ऐसनऽ करलकै ।

ओ आगू कहलनि जे, नेपाल मे अंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तर पर वन्यजीवक कथा कहब आ संरक्षण संचारक अपार संभावना अछि।ई मात्र भविष्यक लेल प्रतिष्ठित प्रजाति केँ बचाबय के बात नहि अछि बल्कि ओकरा समर्थन करय बला व्यापक पारिस्थितिकी तंत्र के लेल सेहो अछि।एहि सँ लोक प्रकृतिक रक्षा लेल प्रोत्साहित होइत अछि आ एहि सँ बदला मे मानव आजीविका सुनिश्चित होइत अछि।”

उपकरण ओम यादव का उपयोग करता है:

निकॉन जेड 9 निकॉन डी 810

title: US Deputy Secretary of State Sarah B. Rogers Participates in Ascent Summit in Nepal - Ratopati
description: US Deputy Secretary of State Sarah B. Rogers Participates in Ascent Summit in Nepal  Ratopati
publisher.title: Ratopati
full_article: Kathmandu. US Deputy Secretary of State for Diplomacy and Public Affairs Sarah B. Rogers has participated in the Ascent Summit. Deputy Secretary of State Rogers, who arrived in Nepal yesterday evening, will deliver a special address as the chief guest at the Ascent Summit 2026. The US Embassy in Nepal stated that Deputy Secretary of State Rogers, who will be in Nepal until tomorrow, will meet with high-ranking officials of the Nepal government and representatives of the American Chamber of Commerce at the summit that began today, and will also hold separate meetings with alumni of various American educational programs. During the meetings, she will express her views in favor of freedom of expression and digital freedom, which are the main pillars of an open society and economic prosperity, the embassy stated. During her visit, Deputy Secretary of State Rogers will also visit the historic Patan Durbar Square in Lalitpur and observe seven archaeological sites that have been renovated and preserved with the support of the US Ambassador's Cultural Heritage Fund. It has been stated that her visit will further emphasize the United States' continued cooperation and commitment to the preservation of historical heritage, which is central to the lives of the Nepali community, religious practices, and the tourism economy. This is the highest-level diplomatic visit from the US since the formation of the new government. Earlier, on Jestha 8, Assistant Secretary of State for South and Central Asian Affairs of the US, Paul Kapur, and on Jestha 17, Special Envoy for South and Central Asian Affairs and US Ambassador to India, S.g. Nepal visited. On Jestha 14, Foreign Minister Shishir Khanal spoke by telephone with US Deputy Secretary of State for Political Affairs Alison Hooker. Minister Khanal expressed gratitude on behalf of the Nepal government to the US government for its continuous support in Nepal's overall development. Minister Khanal informed her about the Nepal government's priorities of achieving economic growth through investment in good governance and infrastructure, energy, tourism, and digital technology. Deputy Secretary of State Hooker stated that the US is ready to cooperate with Nepal and praised Nepal's national development priorities.
translated: काठमांडू। अमेरिकी कूटनीति आरू जनसंपर्क केरऽ उप विदेश सचिव सारा बी रोजर्स न॑ एसेंट समिट म॑ भाग लेल॑ छै । काल्हि साँझ नेपाल पहुँचल उपविदेश सचिव रोजर्स आरोहण शिखर सम्मेलन २०२६ मे मुख्य अतिथिक रूप मे विशेष संबोधन करताह ।नेपाल मे अमेरिकी दूतावास काल्हि धरि नेपाल मे रहय बला विदेश उपसचिव रोजर्स आइ सँ शुरू भेल शिखर सम्मेलन मे नेपाल सरकारक उच्च पदस्थ अधिकारी आ अमेरिकन वाणिज्य संघक प्रतिनिधि सभ सँ भेंट करताह, आ आयोजन सेहो करताह से कहलनि विभिन्न अमेरिकी शैक्षिक कार्यक्रम के पूर्व छात्रों के साथ अलग-अलग बैठक | दूतावास के कहब छै कि बैठकऽ के दौरान हुनी अभिव्यक्ति के स्वतंत्रता आरू डिजिटल स्वतंत्रता के पक्ष म॑ अपनऽ विचार व्यक्त करतै, जे खुला समाज आरू आर्थिक समृद्धि के मुख्य स्तंभ छै । अपनऽ दौरा के दौरान विदेश उप सचिव रोजर्स ललितपुर केरऽ ऐतिहासिक पाटन दरबार चौक के दौरा भी करतै आरू सात पुरातात्विक स्थलऽ के अवलोकन करतै जेकरऽ नवीनीकरण आरू संरक्षण अमेरिकी राजदूत केरऽ सांस्कृतिक धरोहर कोष के सहयोग स॑ करलऽ गेलऽ छै । कहलऽ गेलऽ छै कि हुनकऽ ई यात्रा स॑ अमेरिका केरऽ निरंतर सहयोग आरू ऐतिहासिक धरोहर के संरक्षण के प्रति प्रतिबद्धता प॑ आरू जोर देलऽ जैतै, जे नेपाली समुदाय के जीवन, धार्मिक प्रथा, आरू पर्यटन अर्थव्यवस्था के केंद्र म॑ छै । नयका सरकार केरऽ गठन के बाद स॑ ई अमेरिका केरऽ उच्चतम स्तरीय कूटनीतिक यात्रा छेकै । एहि सं पहिने जेस्था 8 पर अमेरिका के दक्षिण आ मध्य एशियाई मामला के सहायक विदेश सचिव पॉल कपुर आ जेस्था 17 पर दक्षिण आ मध्य एशियाई मामला के विशेष दूत आ भारत मे अमेरिकी राजदूत एस.जी. नेपाल भ्रमण। जेस्था 14 कए विदेश मंत्री शिशिर खनाल अमेरिकी राजनीतिक मामला क उप विदेश सचिव एलिसन हूकर स टेलीफोन पर गप केलथि। मन्त्री खनाल नेपाल सरकारके तरफसँ नेपालके समग्र विकासमे निरन्तर सहयोगके लेल अमेरिका सरकारके आभार व्यक्त कएलन्हि । मंत्री खनाल हुनका सुशासन आ बुनियादी ढांचा, ऊर्जा, पर्यटन, आ डिजिटल तकनीक मे निवेश क माध्यम स आर्थिक विकास हासिल करबाक नेपाल सरकार क प्राथमिकता क जानकारी देलथि। विदेश उपसचिव हूकर नेपालक संग सहयोग करबाक लेल अमेरिका तत्पर रहल बतौलनि आ नेपालक राष्ट्रिय विकास प्राथमिकताके प्रशंसा कएलनि ।

title: Nepal beats China by 221 runs - The Rising Nepal

full_article:
By TRN Online, Kathmandu, May 31: Nepal beat China by 221 runs in Asian Games Men's Qualifier played at Singapore today.

Nepal set a target of 314 runs with a loss of two wickets in 20 overs. Kushal Bhurtel smashed 129 runs in 43 balls to put a hefty score before China.

Captain Rohit Paudel scored 69 runs in 21 balls, Kushal Malla scored 85 runs 47 balls, Aasif Sheikh scored scored 11 runs in 10 balls.

Ma Qiancheng and Deng Jinqi took one wicket each.

Meanwhile, Chinese team got wrapped up at a score of 92 runs in 20.2 overs.

Du Jianyao scored 3 runs in 8 balls, Du Jianhao scored 17 runs in 26 balls, Captain Tian Senqun scored 12 runs in 17 balls, Shenjian Zheng scored 31 runs in 15 balls, Chen Zhuo Yue scored 9 runs in 25 balls, Yang Wangjie scored 1 run in 4 balls.

title: TVS Motor Launches Ronin Monotone and Agonda Variants in Nepal - Autocar Professional
description: TVS Motor Launches Ronin Monotone and Agonda Variants in Nepal  Autocar Professional
publisher.title: Autocar Professional
full_article:
TVS Motor Company has launched the Ronin Monotone and Ronin Agonda variants in Nepal, expanding its premium motorcycle lineup in the market.

The TVS Ronin Monotone is priced at NPR 429,900 (ex-showroom) and will be available in Lightning Black and Magma Red colours. The TVS Ronin Agonda, offered in Pearl White, is priced at NPR 439,900 (ex-showroom).

The motorcycles were unveiled at an event in Kathmandu as part of the company's efforts to strengthen its presence in Nepal's premium motorcycle segment.

The Agonda edition draws design inspiration from Agonda Beach in Goa and features a white colour scheme with blue and red pinstripes on the fuel tank. It also gets an all-white headlamp cowl and a black TVS emblem.

Both variants are powered by a 225.9cc engine producing 20.4 PS at 7,750 rpm and 19.93 Nm of torque at 3,750 rpm.

The motorcycles are equipped with Glide Through Technology (GTT), an assist and slipper clutch, and 41 mm upside-down front forks.

TVS Motor said the launch is aimed at expanding options for young urban riders in Nepal. The company currently sells a range of premium motorcycles, scooters and commuter motorcycles in the country as part of its broader international operations.

title: PM Shah says Nepal in talks with India, China and UK over border dispute - Khabarhub
description: PM Shah says Nepal in talks with India, China and UK over border dispute  Khabarhub
publisher.title: Khabarhub
full_article:
KATHMANDU: Prime Minister (PM) Balen Shah has said that Nepal has held discussions with India, China, and the United Kingdom regarding the country’s disputed territory. He made the remarks while responding to questions from lawmakers in the House of Representatives on Sunday.

“We have spoken not only with India and China but also with the United Kingdom government,” Prime Minister Shah said. “Since the issue arising from the legacy of British India still persists, we believe the UK should also take an interest in it.”

During the session, UML lawmaker Padma Aryal raised concerns over reports of India using Nepali territory for road construction.

In response, the Prime Minister informed the House that Nepal had already sent a diplomatic note to India on the matter and received a reply from New Delhi. He said both sides have agreed to resolve the issue through talks involving historians and border experts.

Separately, Prime Minister Shah also said the government will review the reports of all commissions in a single file and take appropriate action.

He made the remark while responding to questions raised by Nepali Congress MP Arjun Narsingh KC in the House.

Responding to another query regarding the recently publicised report of the National Human Rights Commission on the Gen-Z protests, he said the government would study the findings and take action accordingly.
translated:
काठमाण्डु, मिथिला मिरर: प्रधानमन्त्री बलेन शाह देशके विवादित क्षेत्रके सम्बन्धमे नेपाल भारत, चीन, आ यूनाइटेड किंगडमके साथ चर्चा केने बतौलनि अछि । ओ ई बात रविदिन प्रतिनिधि सभा मे विधायक सभक सवालक जवाब दैत कहलनि।

प्रधानमंत्री शाह कहलनि जे, हम भारत आ चीन सं नहि, यूनाइटेड किंगडम सरकार सं सेहो बात केलहुं अछि। “चूंकि ब्रिटिश भारत केरऽ विरासत स॑ पैदा होय वाला मुद्दा अखनी भी कायम छै, ई लेली हमरऽ मानना ​​छै कि यूके क॑ भी एकरा म॑ दिलचस्पी लेना चाहियऽ ।”

अधिवेशन के दौरान एमाले के विधायक पद्म आर्यल भारत के नेपाली इलाका के सडक निर्माण के लेल उपयोग करय के खबर पर चिंता व्यक्त केलखिन्ह.

एकरऽ जवाब म॑ प्रधानमंत्री सदन क॑ सूचित करलकै कि नेपाल न॑ ई मामला प॑ भारत क॑ कूटनीतिक नोट भेज॑ चुकलऽ छै आरू ओकरा नई दिल्ली स॑ जवाब मिललै । ओ कहलनि जे, इतिहासकार आ सीमा विशेषज्ञ सं जुड़ल बातचीत के माध्यम सं दुनू पक्ष एहि मुद्दा के समाधान पर सहमत भ गेल अछि।

अलग-अलग प्रधानमंत्री शाह इहो कहलनि जे सरकार एकहि फाइल मे सब आयोग के रिपोर्ट के समीक्षा करत आ उचित कार्रवाई करत।

सदन मे नेपाली कांग्रेस सांसद अर्जुन नरसिंह केसी द्वारा उठाओल गेल प्रश्नक उत्तर दैत ओ ई बात कहलनि ।

जेन-जेड विरोध प्रदर्शन पर राष्ट्रीय मानवाधिकार आयोग के हाल में प्रचारित रिपोर्ट के संबंध में एकटा आओर सवाल के जवाब दैत ओ कहलनि जे सरकार एहि निष्कर्ष के अध्ययन करत आ तदनुसार कार्रवाई करत।
label: Opinion

title: PM Shah says border disputes exist on both sides of Nepal-India boundary - Khabarhub
description: PM Shah says border disputes exist on both sides of Nepal-India boundary  Khabarhub
publisher.title: Khabarhub
full_article:
KATHMANDU: Prime Minister (PM) Balen Shah has said that he has learned Nepal may also have encroached on some areas of Indian territory, alongside ongoing disputes over Nepal’s own land.

While responding to a question raised by Shram Sanskriti Party MP Aren Rai in the House of Representatives on Sunday, the Prime Minister said efforts are underway to resolve the Lipulekh, Kalapani, and Limpiyadhura boundary issues through diplomatic channels.

During his remarks, he added, “You may find this surprising. I recently learned after becoming Prime Minister that not only India has encroached on Nepal’s territory, but Nepal has also encroached on some areas of India.”
translated:
काठमाण्डु, मिथिला मिरर: प्रधानमन्त्री बलेन शाह नेपालक अपन जमीन पर जारी विवादक संग-संग भारतीय क्षेत्रक किछु क्षेत्रमे नेपाल सेहो अतिक्रमण कएने भऽ सकैत अछि से पता चलल बतौलनि अछि ।

रविदिन प्रतिनिधि सभा मे श्रम संस्कृति पार्टी के सांसद अरेन राय द्वारा उठाओल गेल सवाल के जवाब दैत प्रधानमंत्री कहलनि जे, कूटनीतिक माध्यम सं लिपुलेख, कालापानी, आ लिम्पियाधुरा सीमा के मुद्दा के समाधान के प्रयास चलि रहल अछि।

अपनऽ टिप्पणी के दौरान हुनी आरू कहलकै, “अहाँ सब क॑ ई बात आश्चर्यजनक लगै सकै छै, हाल ही म॑ हमरा प्रधानमंत्री बनला के बाद पता चललै कि भारत न॑ ही नेपाल केरऽ इलाका प॑ अतिक्रमण करलकै, बल्कि नेपाल न॑ भारत केरऽ कुछ क्षेत्रऽ प॑ भी अतिक्रमण करलकै ।”

title: Border issues with India will be settled 'through table talks', Nepal PM says - Firstpost
description: Border issues with India will be settled 'through table talks', Nepal PM says  Firstpost
publisher.title: Firstpost
full_article:
Rapper-turned-politician and Nepal Prime Minister Balendra Shah on Sunday addressed Parliament for the first time since assuming office following the March elections, saying all outstanding border disputes with India would be resolved through diplomatic engagement and dialogue.

Addressing lawmakers, Shah said the border issue with India would be settled through talks and diplomatic efforts, underlining his government’s commitment to maintaining friendly relations with its southern neighbour while pursuing a peaceful resolution to longstanding territorial disagreements.

STORY CONTINUES BELOW THIS AD

“The border issue with India will be resolved through table talks and diplomatic efforts,” Shah said.

Nepal to raise Lipulekh issue with UK

Referring to Nepal’s claim over the Lipulekh-Limpiyadhura region, Shah said Kathmandu would also take up the matter with the United Kingdom, arguing that the origins of the dispute date back to the era of British India.

He said Nepal would seek a resolution through diplomatic channels and dialogue with India, reiterating that his government favours engagement over confrontation.

The Prime Minister added that Nepal would continue to prioritise diplomacy, mutual respect and constructive engagement while dealing with sensitive bilateral issues.

History of the dispute

India and Nepal share an open border of about 1,751 kilometres and maintain deep cultural, economic and people-to-people ties. However, differences persist over sections of their boundary, particularly the Kalapani-Limpiyadhura-Lipulekh region in the west and Susta in the south.

The dispute stems from differing interpretations of the 1816 Treaty of Sugauli signed between the Kingdom of Nepal and British India, with both sides maintaining competing claims over the contested territories.

Tensions since 2020

The boundary issue gained renewed attention in 2020 after India inaugurated a road linking Dharchula in Uttarakhand to Lipulekh Pass, a route used for the Kailash Mansarovar pilgrimage.

In response, Nepal released a revised political map depicting Kalapani, Lipulekh and Limpiyadhura within its territory and later incorporated the map through a constitutional amendment.

title: PM Shah says that just like India has encroached on Nepali land, Nepal has also encroached on India’s - The Kathmandu Post
description: PM Shah says that just like India has encroached on Nepali land, Nepal has also encroached on India’s  The Kathmandu Post
publisher.title: The Kathmandu Post
full_article:
Speaking in Parliament on Sunday, Prime Minister Balendra Shah said it is not only that India has encroached on Nepali territories, but Nepal has also encroached on Indian territories.

“After becoming prime minister, I came to know that not only has India encroached on Nepal’s land, but Nepal has also encroached on India’s land in multiple places,” Prime Minister Shah said, while answering a question from Aaren Rai of Shram Sanskriti Party in parliament. “Both sides need to sit down and look into the matter.”

Replying to a separate question from UML deputy parliamentary party leader Padma Aryal on trade between India and China through Lipulekh and Limpiyadhura, Shah said the disputes over Lipulekh, Limpiyadhura and Kalapani would be resolved through diplomatic dialogue.

The prime minister said Nepal had already sent an official diplomatic note to India and received a response.

“The response states that both governments will form teams comprising historians, surveyors and experts familiar with the territory and seek a resolution through table talks,” Shah said.

He added that Nepal had also engaged in diplomatic discussions with China and the United Kingdom regarding the border dispute.

“We have spoken not only with India and China but also with the UK government. Our view is that the UK should also take an interest, as the issue dates back to the period when British India left the region,” Shah said.

Separately, he said the government would study and implement all reports submitted to it, including those from the National Human Rights Commission and the report on the Gen Z protests of September 8 and 9.

Responding to questions raised by different lawmakers in the House of Representatives, Shah said several reports awaited implementation and that the government would take action after reviewing them.

“Not only the Human Rights Commission’s report, but also the report on the events of September 8 and 9 and reports from various other commissions have been submitted to the government,” Shah said. “The government will study all of them and act accordingly.”

Responding to questions raised by lawmakers in the House of Representatives, he said that the government was working towards providing land and settlement arrangements for landless squatters and that the process would take time.

Saying that such matters should not be rushed, he said it would take as much time as necessary. He claimed that squatters living in risky conditions in Kathmandu had been moved to another place.

“Although it may appear that squatters were chased away, this is the implementation of a plan from four years ago. Those living in Kathmandu were prioritized,” he said. “The reason for giving them priority was floods and their health. The work was done to protect them from illness and risks to their lives.”

Earlier in the meeting, Shah sought time from Speaker DP Aryal to answer lawmakers’ questions. After the prime minister raised his hand to request time, the Speaker allowed him to use the House rostrum.

Shah said he was prepared to respond to lawmakers and requested time for questions that members had been seeking to raise for several days.

Following the request, Speaker Aryal allowed lawmakers to ask questions on behalf of their respective parties. Some lawmakers had earlier objected, questioning whether the process was in line with parliamentary rules.

In previous practice, the Speaker allocated a specific time for question-and-answer sessions with the prime minister, and lawmakers submitted their questions in writing beforehand.

प्रधानमंत्री कहलनि जे, नेपाल भारत केँ आधिकारिक कूटनीतिक नोट पठा चुकल अछि आ ओकर प्रतिक्रिया सेहो भेटल अछि।

शाह कहलनि जे, प्रतिक्रिया मे कहल गेल अछि जे दुनू सरकार इतिहासकार, सर्वेयर आ इलाका सं परिचित विशेषज्ञ के टीम बनाओत आ टेबल टॉक के माध्यम सं समाधान मांगत।

ओ इहो कहलनि जे, नेपाल सीमा विवाद के संबंध मे चीन आ यूनाइटेड किंगडम के संग कूटनीतिक चर्चा सेहो केलक अछि।

शाह कहला जे हम भारत आ चीन स नहि बल्कि ब्रिटेन सरकार स सेहो गप केलहुं अछि, हमर विचार अछि जे ब्रिटेन कए सेहो रुचि लेबाक चाही, किया कि इ मुद्दा ओहि समय स अछि जखन ब्रिटिश भारत एहि क्षेत्र कए छोड़ि देलक।

अलग-अलग हुनी कहलकै कि सरकार ओकरा सौंपलौ गेलौ सब रिपोर्ट के अध्ययन करी क लागू करतै, जेकरा मँ राष्ट्रीय मानवाधिकार आयोग के रिपोर्ट आरू 8 आरू 9 सितंबर के जेन जेड विरोध प्रदर्शन के रिपोर्ट शामिल छै ।

प्रतिनिधि सभा मे विभिन्न विधायक द्वारा उठाओल गेल सवालक जवाब दैत शाह कहलनि जे, कतेको रिपोर्ट लागू करबाक प्रतीक्षा अछि आ सरकार एकर समीक्षा केलाक बाद कार्रवाई करत।

शाह कहलनि जे, मानवाधिकार आयोग के रिपोर्ट त नहि, 8 आ 9 सितंबर के घटना के रिपोर्ट आ विभिन्न अन्य आयोग के रिपोर्ट सेहो सरकार के सौंपल गेल अछि। “सरकार सभटा अध्ययन करत आ तदनुसार काज करत।”

प्रतिनिधि सभा मे विधायक द्वारा उठल सवालक जवाब दैत ओ कहलनि जे, सरकार भूमिहीन सुकून के लेल जमीन आ बस्ती के व्यवस्था उपलब्ध करेबाक दिशा मे काज क रहल अछि आ एहि प्रक्रिया मे समय लागत।

एहि तरहक मामला मे हड़बड़ी नहि करबाक चाही कहैत ओ कहलनि जे, जतेक समय लागत, ओतेक समय लागत। काठमांडू मे जोखिम भरल अवस्था मे रहनिहार सुकून के दोसर ठाम स्थानांतरित कएल गेल दाबी कएलनि ।

ओ कहलनि जे, भले ई बुझना जा सकैत अछि जे सुकून के लोक के भगा देल गेल छल, मुदा इ चारि साल पहिने के योजना के क्रियान्वयन अछि, काठमांडू मे रहय वाला के प्राथमिकता देल गेल छल। “हिनका सब के प्राथमिकता देबाक कारण छल बाढ़ि आ हुनकर स्वास्थ्य। ई काज हुनका सब के बीमारी आ जान के खतरा स बचाबय के लेल कयल गेल छल।”

एहि सं पहिने एहि बैसार मे शाह सभापति डीपी अर्यल सं विधायक के सवाल के जवाब देबय लेल समय मंगलखिन्ह. प्रधानमंत्री के हाथ उठा क समय के आग्रह करला के बाद सभापति हुनका सदन के मंच के इस्तेमाल करय के अनुमति द देलखिन्ह.

शाह कहलनि जे, ओ विधायक के जवाब देबय लेल तैयार छथिन्ह आओर ओहि सवाल के लेल समय मांगलखिन्ह जेकरा सदस्य कई दिन सं उठाबय चाहय छथिन्ह.

एहि आग्रह के बाद सभापति अर्यल विधायक के अपन-अपन दल के तरफ सं सवाल पूछय के अनुमति देलखिन्ह. किछु विधायक एहि स पहिने आपत्ति जतौने छलाह जे की इ प्रक्रिया संसदीय नियम क अनुरूप अछि।

पिछला अभ्यास में सभापति प्रधानमंत्री के साथ प्रश्नोत्तरी सत्र के लेल एकटा विशिष्ट समय आवंटित केने छलाह, आ विधायक सब पहिने अपन सवाल लिखित रूप में जमा करैत छलाह.

title: Nepal PM Balendra Shah backs dialogue, diplomatic efforts to resolve border dispute with India - WION
description: Nepal PM Balendra Shah backs dialogue, diplomatic efforts to resolve border dispute with India  WION
publisher.title: WION
full_article:
Nepal Prime Minister Balendra Shah on Sunday stated that the border dispute with India will be addressed through dialogue and diplomatic engagement. Shah also underscored the need for negotiations and peaceful discussions, and added that the boundary issue with India would be resolved through talks and diplomatic channels.



Speaking in the Parliament of Nepal for the first time since coming to power after the March election, Shah noted that India had previously assured of remaining open to constructive talks with Nepal on all issues in the bilateral relationship. The talks also include resolving outstanding boundary issues through dialogue and diplomacy.

Responding to media questions about border-related claims made by Nepal’s Foreign Ministry in connection with the annual Kailash Manasarovar Yatra, Randeep Jaiswal said that India’s position on the matter has remained consistent and unambiguous. "Lipulekh Pass has been a long-standing route for the Kailash Manasarovar Yatra since 1954, and the Yatra through this route has been going on for decades. This is not a new development," he said.



"As regards territorial claims, India has consistently maintained that such claims are neither justified nor based on historical facts and evidence. Such unilateral artificial enlargement of territorial claims is untenable," the Spokesperson added.

title: ‘Nepal Has Encroached on Indian Territory Too’, Says Nepal PM, Calls for UK’s Involvement in Mediation - TheWire.in
description: ‘Nepal Has Encroached on Indian Territory Too’, Says Nepal PM, Calls for UK’s Involvement in Mediation  TheWire.in
publisher.title: TheWire.in
full_article:
New Delhi: Nepal Prime Minister Balendra Shah on Sunday said that Nepal had encroached on Indian territories like the latter had done on Nepali territories, and called for UK’s involvement in the mediation process.

According to a report in the Kathmandu Post, Shah made the statement while answering a question from Aaren Rai of Shram Sanskriti Party in parliament.

“After becoming prime minister, I came to know that not only has India encroached on Nepal’s land, but Nepal has also encroached on India’s land in multiple places. Both sides need to sit down and look into the matter,” Shah said.

While answering a separate question from Communist Party of Nepal (Unified Marxist–Leninist) deputy parliamentary party leader Padma Aryal, on the dispute over Lipulekh and Limpiyadhura, Shah said that the matter will be resolved through diplomatic dialogue.

Shah said that Nepal had also reached out to China and the UK over the border dispute. “We have spoken not only with India and China but also with the UK government. Our view is that the UK should also take an interest, as the issue dates back to the period when British India left the region,” Shah said.

According to the report, Nepal has already sent an official diplomatic note to India. Regarding India’s response to the note, Shah said, “The response states that both governments will form teams comprising historians, surveyors and experts familiar with the territory and seek a resolution through table talks.”

Earlier this month, India had rejected Nepal’s claims on Limpiyadhura, Lipulekh and Kalapani. On May 3, the foreign ministry of Nepal had issued a statement saying that “Limpiyadhura, Lipulekh and Kalapani, situated east of the Mahakali River, have been integral parts of Nepal’s territory since the Sugauli Treaty of 1816.”

Nepal said it had conveyed its concerns to both India and China through diplomatic channels and had “continuously urged” India not to carry out “any activities such as road construction or expansion, border trade and pilgrimage” in the area. It also said it had officially informed China that the Lipulekh area is Nepali territory.

Within a couple of hours, India’s Ministry of External Affairs spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal responded that India’s position “has been consistent and clear” and that the Lipulekh Pass “has been a long standing route for the Kailash Manasarovar Yatra since 1954.”

The Nepali statement had come in response to India’s announcement on May 1 that the 2026 Kailash Mansarovar Yatra would run from June to August, with 10 batches of 50 pilgrims each travelling through the Lipulekh Pass in Uttarakhand and another 10 batches through the Nathu La Pass in Sikkim. The Chinese Embassy in New Delhi welcomed the resumption of the pilgrimage, saying China would facilitate 1,000 Indian pilgrims this year.

title: Nepal PM's Remarks on Indian Land Encroachment Spark Debate - Devdiscourse
description: Nepal PM's Remarks on Indian Land Encroachment Spark Debate  Devdiscourse
publisher.title: Devdiscourse
full_article:
Nepal's Prime Minister Balendra Shah has stirred controversy with remarks claiming that Nepal has encroached on Indian territories, amid a long-standing border dispute over areas like Kalapani, Lipulekh, and Limpiyadhura.

Shah noted that both Nepal and India have allegedly encroached upon each other's lands. In response to inquiries in parliament, he emphasized the importance of historical and expert involvement to diplomatically resolve these disputes. While the diplomatic dialogue includes China and the UK, experts and former diplomats have challenged Shah's claims, pointing to prior agreements that have addressed most border issues.

Shah's comments have drawn criticism on social media, with experts refuting the assertion of Nepal's encroachment. They note historical studies have not documented such incidences, reinforcing the need for diplomatic approaches and historical accuracy in addressing remaining border challenges.

(With inputs from agencies.)

शाह नेपाल आ भारत दुनू एक दोसराक जमीन पर कथित तौर पर अतिक्रमण केने अछि । संसद म॑ पूछताछ के जवाब म॑ हुनी ई विवादऽ के कूटनीतिक समाधान लेली ऐतिहासिक आरू विशेषज्ञऽ के भागीदारी के महत्व प॑ जोर देलकै । कूटनीतिक संवाद म॑ चीन आरू ब्रिटेन शामिल छै, लेकिन विशेषज्ञ आरू पूर्व राजनयिक न॑ शाह केरऽ दावा क॑ चुनौती देल॑ छै, जेकरा म॑ पूर्व समझौता के तरफ इशारा करलऽ गेलऽ छै जेकरा म॑ अधिकांश सीमा मुद्दा क॑ संबोधित करलऽ गेलऽ छै ।

title: Nepal has also encroached upon Indian territory, says PM Balendra Shah - The Hindu
description: Nepal has also encroached upon Indian territory, says PM Balendra Shah  The Hindu
publisher.title: The Hindu
full_article:
Nepal Prime Minister Balendra Shah said on Sunday (May 31, 2026) that Nepal too has encroached upon some Indian territories, in what is considered to be the first such public statement by a Nepali head of government.

Mr. Shah was responding to a question by a lawmaker in Parliament regarding the Kalapani region, which remains disputed between Nepal and India, with both countries claiming sovereignty over it.

Concerns emerge over process as Nepal PM Balendra Shah pushes ahead

“You might find it strange, but I also learned only recently — after becoming Prime Minister — that it’s not just India but Nepal too has encroached upon Indian territories in many places,” Mr. Shah said, prompting an uproar in Parliament as the Opposition objected to the statement.

Lawmakers from the Nepali Congress and the Nepal Communist Party demanded that the Prime Minister clarify where exactly Nepal has encroached upon Indian territory and sought the removal of his remarks from the record.

“There are border disputes between Nepal and India. But the Prime Minister said Nepal has encroached upon Indian territory,” said Nepali Congress Chief Whip Basana Thapa. “Where exactly has this happened? The Prime Minister must make the House aware of this. This is a serious and objectionable statement.”

Stating that the Prime Minister may have spoken without factual basis on the border issue between the two countries, she demanded that the statement be expunged from parliamentary records.

Nepal Communist Party lawmaker Ramesh Malla said the Prime Minister’s remarks from the parliamentary rostrum could damage national integrity.

Path ahead for Nepal’s new leadership

“This is not a trivial matter,” Mr. Malla said. “I feel he may have treated the subject matter as if it were something said in an informal conversation. This is a very serious issue. Can the head of government or head of state of any country stand on a platform and say that they have encroached upon the land of another country? How serious is this matter?”

Sunday’s address to Parliament was the first by Mr. Shah, a senior leader of the Rastriya Swatantra Party, since he took office on March 27 following elections held earlier that month, the first since the September Gen Z protests last year.

He had previously faced criticism for his reluctance to address Parliament and his absence from parliamentary sessions.

Mr. Shah did not address the first meeting of the newly elected Parliament on April 2. On May 11, when President Ram Chandra Poudel was presenting the government’s policies and programmes, Mr. Shah walked out midway. The following day, he again broke parliamentary tradition by refusing to respond to questions on the policies and programmes.

However, on Sunday (May 31), Mr. Shah suddenly raised his hand, expressing his desire to answer lawmakers’ questions.

India-China border trade through Lipu Lekh ‘unexpected and unacceptable’ to Nepal, says former Nepali Foreign Minister

While stating that the Lipulekh, Limpiyadhura, and Kalapani dispute would be resolved through dialogue, he also remarked that Nepal has encroached upon Indian territory.

The region, on the northwestern rim, has been a long-standing irritant between Nepal and India, and the dispute resurfaced recently when India announced the Kailash Manasarovar Yatra pilgrimage via the Lipulekh route.

Nepal then sent diplomatic notes to both India and China. India, however, maintains that the Lipulekh pass is a historic trade and pilgrimage route within its territory.

MEA rejects Nepal’s claims over Lipulekh after India, China restart trade through border points

Nepal asserted its claim over the region in 2020 during K.P. Sharma Oli’s tenure as Prime Minister, when the government amended the constitution to include Lipulekh, Limpiyadhura, and Kalapani in its official map. The move followed India’s publication of a new political map in November 2019, which showed the region within Indian territory.

Mr. Shah, 36, became Nepal’s Prime Minister after serving as Mayor of Kathmandu for three and a half years. During his mayoral tenure, he was known for his “nationalist” stance. At one point, he even displayed a “Greater Nepal” map in his office, reportedly in response to the “Akhand Bharat” map displayed in the Indian Parliament.

Within two months in office, Mr. Shah has pursued a more assertive foreign policy, refusing one-on-one meetings with foreign officials and Ambassadors. A scheduled visit by Indian Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri on May 11 was postponed, largely due to Mr. Shah’s refusal to allocate time for the meeting.

A tide in the affairs of Nepal

Mr. Shah’s comments on Sunday came just a day before his party president Rabi Lamichhane’s scheduled visit to New Delhi. Mr. Lamichhane is set to meet senior officials in Delhi during his five-day visit.

Border experts, however, say Mr. Shah’s statement that Nepal has encroached upon Indian territory is not supported by facts.

During Sunday’s House meeting, Mr. Shah said that the Nepal government has received a response to its diplomatic note from India.

“We have had communication not just with India and China but also England,” he said, referring to the United Kingdom. “Our position is that since the dispute dates back to when the British left India, England should also have concerns about the matter. All these issues should be resolved through dialogue and diplomatic table talks.”

नेपालक प्रधानमन्त्री बलेन्द्र शाह रविदिन (३१ मई २०२६) कहलनि जे नेपाल सेहो किछु भारतीय क्षेत्र अतिक्रमण केलक अछि, जेकरा नेपाली सरकार प्रमुख द्वारा एहन पहिल सार्वजनिक बयान मानल जाइत अछि ।

श्री शाह संसद मे एकटा विधायक द्वारा नेपाल आ भारतक बीच विवादित कालापानी क्षेत्रक संबंध मे एकटा प्रश्नक उत्तर दऽ रहल छलाह, जाहि मे दुनू देश एहि पर संप्रभुताक दावा कएने अछि ।

नेपाल के पीएम बलेन्द्र शाह के आगू बढ़ला के बाद प्रक्रिया पर चिंता सामने आबि रहल अछि

श्री शाह न॑ कहलकै कि आपक॑ ई बात अजीब लगतै, लेकिन हमरा ई भी हाल ही म॑ पता चललै — प्रधानमंत्री बनला के बाद — कि ई खाली भारत ही नै बल्कि नेपाल न॑ भी बहुत जगह प॑ भारतीय क्षेत्रऽ प॑ अतिक्रमण करलकै ।

नेपाली कांग्रेस आ नेपाल कम्युनिस्ट पार्टीक विधायक प्रधानमन्त्री स स्पष्ट करबाक मांग केलथि जे नेपाल भारतीय क्षेत्र मे ठीक-ठीक कतय अतिक्रमण केलक अछि आ हुनकर टिप्पणी रिकॉर्ड स हटाबय के मांग केलक अछि।

नेपाली कांग्रेसक प्रमुख सचेतक बसना थापा कहलनि जे, नेपाल आ भारतक बीच सीमा विवाद अछि, मुदा प्रधानमन्त्री कहलनि जे नेपाल भारतीय क्षेत्र अतिक्रमण केलक अछि । ओ कहलनि जे, ई ठीक-ठीक कतय भेल अछि, प्रधानमंत्री केँ सदन केँ एहि बात सँ अवगत कराबय पड़तनि, ई गंभीर आ आपत्तिजनक बयान अछि।”

प्रधानमंत्री दूनू देश के बीच सीमा मुद्दा पर बिना तथ्यात्मक आधार के बात केने हेताह कहैत ओ संसदीय रिकॉर्ड स बयान के मिटाबय के मांग केलनि।

नेपाल कम्युनिस्ट पार्टीक विधायक रमेश मल्ल संसदीय मंचसँ प्रधानमन्त्रीक टिप्पणीसँ राष्ट्रिय अखंडताकेँ क्षति पहुँचा सकैत बतौलनि ।

नेपालक नव नेतृत्वक लेल आगू बाट

श्री मल्ला कहलनि जे, ई कोनो तुच्छ बात नहि अछि। ओ कहलनि जे, हमरा लगैत अछि जे ओ विषय के एहन व्यवहार केने हेताह जेना कोनो अनौपचारिक गप्प मे कहल गेल हो, ई बहुत गंभीर मुद्दा अछि, की कोनो देश के सरकार के मुखिया या राष्ट्रपति कोनो मंच पर ठाढ़ भ क कहि सकैत छथि जे ओ सब दोसर देश के जमीन पर अतिक्रमण केने छथि? ई मामला कतेक गंभीर अछि?”

रविदिन संसद मे देल गेल संबोधन राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी के वरिष्ठ नेता श्री शाह के पहिल संबोधन छल, जखन कि ओ ओहि महीना के शुरू मे भेल चुनाव के बाद 27 मार्च के पदभार संभालने छलाह, जे पिछला साल सितंबर मे जेन जेड विरोध प्रदर्शन के बाद पहिल संबोधन छल.

पहिने संसद कए संबोधित करबा मे अनिच्छा आ संसदीय सत्र मे अनुपस्थिति क कारण आलोचना क सामना करय पड़ल छल।

श्री शाह 2 अप्रैल कए नवनिर्वाचित संसद क पहिल बैसार कए संबोधित नहि केलथि, 11 मई कए जखन राष्ट्रपति रामचंद्र पौडेल सरकार क नीति आ कार्यक्रम पेश क रहल छलाह तखन श्री शाह बीच मे वॉक आउट भ गेलाह। दोसर दिन नीति आ कार्यक्रम पर सवाल के जवाब देबय सं मना क फेर सं संसदीय परंपरा के तोड़ि देलखिन्ह.

मुदा रविदिन (31 मई) के श्री शाह अचानक हाथ उठौलखिन्ह आओर विधायक के सवाल के जवाब देबय के इच्छा जतौलखिन्ह.

लिपु लेख के माध्यम स भारत-चीन सीमा व्यापार नेपाल के लेल ‘अप्रत्याशित आ अस्वीकार्य’, नेपाली के पूर्व विदेश मंत्री कहलनि

लिपुलेख, लिम्पियाधुरा, आ कालापानी विवादक समाधान संवादक माध्यमे होयत से कहैत ओ नेपाल भारतीय क्षेत्र पर अतिक्रमण केने सेहो टिप्पणी केलनि ।

उत्तर-पश्चिमी रिम पर बनल ई क्षेत्र नेपाल आ भारतक बीच बहुत दिन सँ चिड़चिड़ा रहल अछि, आ हालहि मे जखन भारत लिपुलेख मार्ग सँ कैलाश मनसरोवर यात्रा यात्राक घोषणा केलक तखन ई विवाद फेर सँ उभरल अछि ।

तखन नेपाल भारत आ चीन दुनू देश केँ कूटनीतिक नोट पठेलक। भारत केरऽ कहना छै कि लिपुलेख दर्रा अपनऽ क्षेत्र के भीतर ऐतिहासिक व्यापार आरू तीर्थ मार्ग छेकै ।

भारत, चीन के सीमा बिंदु के माध्यम सं व्यापार फेर सं शुरू करला के बाद एमईए लिपुलेख पर नेपाल के दावा के खारिज क देलक

नेपाल २०२० मे क्षेत्र पर अपन दावा के.पी. शर्मा ओली केरऽ प्रधानमंत्री के रूप म॑ कार्यकाल, जब॑ सरकार न॑ संविधान म॑ संशोधन करी क॑ लिपुलेख, लिम्पियाधुरा, आरू कलापानी क॑ अपनऽ आधिकारिक नक्शा म॑ शामिल करलकै । ई कदम नवंबर २०१९ म॑ भारत न॑ एगो नया राजनीतिक नक्शा प्रकाशित करला के बाद उठैलऽ गेलऽ छै, जेकरा म॑ ई क्षेत्र क॑ भारतीय क्षेत्र के भीतर देखालऽ गेलऽ छेलै ।

36 वर्षीय श्री शाह साढ़े तीन वर्ष धरि काठमांडू मे मेयर रहला के बाद नेपाल के प्रधानमंत्री बनलाह. मेयर पद के दौरान ओ अपन “राष्ट्रवादी” रुख के लेल जानल जाइत छलाह | एक समय ओ अपन कार्यालय मे “बड़का नेपाल” नक्शा तक प्रदर्शित केलथि, जे भारतीय संसद मे प्रदर्शित “अखंड भारत” नक्शा क जवाब मे कहल जा रहल अछि ।

कार्यकाल के दू महीना के भीतर श्री शाह न॑ विदेशी अधिकारी आरू राजदूतऽ स॑ एक-एक करी क॑ बैठक करै स॑ इनकार करी क॑ अधिक आग्रही विदेश नीति अपनान॑ छै । 11 मई क॑ भारतीय विदेश सचिव विक्रम मिश्री केरऽ निर्धारित यात्रा स्थगित करी देलऽ गेलै, जेकरऽ बहुत हद तलक कारण छेलै श्री शाह न॑ बैठक लेली समय आवंटित करै स॑ मना करी देल॑ छेलै ।

नेपाल के मामलों में एक ज्वार

श्री शाह केरऽ ई टिप्पणी रविवार क॑ हुनकऽ पार्टी अध्यक्ष रबी लामिछाने केरऽ नई दिल्ली केरऽ निर्धारित यात्रा स॑ महज एक दिन पहलें आबी गेलऽ छै । श्री लामिछाने अपन पांच दिन क यात्रा क दौरान दिल्ली मे वरिष्ठ अधिकारी स भेंट करय वाला छथि।

सीमा विशेषज्ञ, तथापि कहैत छथि जे श्री. शाह केरऽ नेपाल न॑ भारतीय क्षेत्र प॑ अतिक्रमण करलऽ गेलऽ बयान के तथ्य स॑ समर्थन नै मिलै छै ।

रविदिन सदन के बैसार के दौरान श्री शाह कहलनि जे, नेपाल सरकार के अपन कूटनीतिक नोट के जवाब भारत सं भेटल अछि.

यूनाइटेड किंगडम क जिक्र करैत ओ कहला जे हमरा सब कए भारत आ चीन स नहि, इंग्लैंड स सेहो संवाद रहल अछि। “हमरऽ स्थिति ई छै कि चूंकि ई विवाद अंग्रेज भारत छोड़ला के समय स॑ शुरू होय छै, ई लेली इंग्लैंड क॑ भी ई मामला प॑ चिंता होना चाहियऽ, ई सब मुद्दा के समाधान बातचीत आरू कूटनीतिक टेबल वार्ता के माध्यम स॑ करलऽ जाय ।”

title: Nepal PM says India, Nepal “encroached” each other’s territories, triggers row - The Indian Express
description: Nepal PM says India, Nepal “encroached” each other’s territories, triggers row  The Indian Express
publisher.title: The Indian Express
full_article:
“The Nepal government has officially sent a diplomatic note to India, mentioning the issue of encroachment of territories by India, including Lipulekh, and we have already received their response,” Shah told the Nepalese parliament. “Both the countries have agreed to resolve the issue sitting together with the help of historians, surveyors and concerned experts through diplomatic means.”

He, however, claimed that it is not only India that has “encroached” land in Nepal, the latter too had done the same with India.

“You will be surprised to know about a fact, which I have learnt recently only after becoming the Prime Minister. India has not only encroached Nepalese territories, but Nepal has also encroached India’s territories in many places,” said Shah. “Now both countries should study the facts and sit together as friends and resolve the issue.”

Shah said Kathmandu also held diplomatic discussions on the issue with China — the three places are located near the trijunction of India, Tibet and Nepal — and the United Kingdom. The prime minister said he took up the matter with the UK because it dates back to a period when the British government left the region.

Story continues below this ad

Shah’s comments about Nepal encroaching Indian territories have triggered a controversy. Many Nepalese social media users criticised it, while some experts dismissed it.

Former Nepalese ambassador to India, Nilambara Acharya told Kantipuronline media portal that the Nepalese PM has “no information regarding Indian territories being encroached by Nepal”. According to Acharya, 97 per cent of the border disputes between the two sides have already been resolved, but there are few that still linger.

There are reports about some Nepalese using land in India and some Indians using land in Nepal due to the missing border pillars in some border areas, but the Nepal government as such has not encroached India’s territory, Acharya claimed.

Another former ambassador of Nepal to India, Deep Kumar Upadhyay said that Nepal encroaching India’s territory is not there in any record.

Story continues below this ad

“India has also not raised this issue on record. So far we have conducted studies, but this issue has never surfaced. I don’t know in which context the prime minister spoke about such a serious matter,” he told the Nepalpress online news portal.

Nepal–India border expert and renowned geographer Buddhi Narayan Shrestha has also dismissed the prime minister’s statement about Nepal encroaching Indian territories.

Nepal has never encroached Indian territories or extended its occupation in the border area. In some border areas due to cross-holding occupations the farmers of both the countries have used each other’s land, he said.

Earlier this month, Nepal’s Foreign Ministry spokesperson Lok Bahadur Chhetri said the country is committed to resolving the border issue with India through diplomatic channels.

Story continues below this ad

Chhetri’s comments had come days after India firmly rejected Nepal’s objection to the upcoming Kailash Mansarovar Yatra via the long-established Lipulekh Pass in Uttarakhand, dismissing Kathmandu’s territorial claims over the region as an “unilateral artificial enlargement” that New Delhi finds “untenable”.
translated:
शाह नेपाली संसदमे कहलनि जे, नेपाल सरकार आधिकारिक तौर पर भारत केँ कूटनीतिक नोट पठौलक अछि, जाहि मे लिपुलेख सहित भारत द्वारा क्षेत्र अतिक्रमणक मुद्दा उल्लेख कयल गेल अछि आ हमरा लोकनि केँ हुनकर प्रतिक्रिया भेटि चुकल अछि। “दुनू देश न॑ इतिहासकार, सर्वेयर आरू संबंधित विशेषज्ञऽ के मदद स॑ कूटनीतिक माध्यम स॑ मिल क॑ ई मुद्दा के समाधान करै प॑ सहमत होय गेलऽ छै ।”

ओना हुनकर दावा छलनि जे नेपाल मे जमीन पर “अतिक्रमण” केवल भारत नहि केलक अछि, बाद वाला सेहो भारतक संग एहने काज केने छल ।

शाह कहलनि जे, एकटा तथ्य के बारे मे जानि क अहां आश्चर्यचकित होयब, जे हमरा हाल मे प्रधानमंत्री बनला के बाद पता चलल अछि, भारत नेपाली इलाका मे त अतिक्रमण नहि केलक अछि, नेपाल भारत के इलाका मे सेहो कई ठाम अतिक्रमण केलक अछि। “आब दुनू देश केँ तथ्यक अध्ययन करबाक चाही आ मित्रक रूप मे एक संग बैसि एहि मुद्दाक समाधान करबाक चाही।”

शाह कहलनि जे, काठमांडू चीन – तिब्बत आ नेपाल के त्रिसंयोग के समीप स्थित तीनू स्थान – आ यूनाइटेड किंगडम के संग सेहो कूटनीतिक चर्चा केलक अछि। प्रधानमंत्री नँ कहलकै कि हुनी ई मामला ब्रिटेन के साथ ऐसनौ वजह स॑ उठैलकै कि ई मामला वू दौर स॑ छै जब॑ ब्रिटिश सरकार न॑ ई क्षेत्र छोड़ी क॑ चल्लऽ गेलै ।

कथा एहि विज्ञापनक नीचाँ जारी अछि

नेपाल के भारतीय क्षेत्र अतिक्रमण करय के बारे मे शाह के टिप्पणी विवाद के शुरुआत क देलक अछि. बहुतो नेपाली सोशल मीडिया यूजर एकर आलोचना केलनि, जखन कि किछु विशेषज्ञ एकरा खारिज क देलनि।

भारत मँ नेपाल केरौ पूर्व राजदूत निलंबरा आचार्य नँ कान्तिपुरोनलाइन मीडिया पोर्टल क कहलकै कि नेपाल केरौ पीएम के पास “नेपाल द्वारा अतिक्रमण करलौ जाय रहलौ भारतीय क्षेत्रौ के संबंध मँ कोनो जानकारी नै छै” । आचार्य क अनुसार दुनू पक्ष क बीच 97 प्रतिशत सीमा विवाद क समाधान भ चुकल अछि, मुदा एहन कम अछि जे एखनो टिकल अछि।

किछु सीमावर्ती क्षेत्र मे सीमा खंभा गायब रहला के कारण भारत मे किछु नेपाली आ नेपाल मे जमीन के उपयोग करय के खबर अछि, मुदा नेपाल सरकार के रूप मे भारत के इलाका मे अतिक्रमण नहि केने अछि, आचार्य के दावा अछि.

भारत मँ नेपाल केरौ एगो आरू पूर्व राजदूत दीप कुमार उपाध्याय नँ कहलकै कि भारत केरौ क्षेत्र मँ अतिक्रमण करै वाला नेपाल कोनो भी रिकॉर्ड मँ नै छै ।

कथा एहि विज्ञापनक नीचाँ जारी अछि

ओ नेपालप्रेस ऑनलाइन न्यूज पोर्टल स’ कहलनि जे, भारत सेहो एहि मुद्दा के रिकॉर्ड मे नहि उठौलक अछि, एखन धरि हम सब अध्ययन केलहुं अछि, मुदा ई मुद्दा कहियो सामने नहि आयल अछि, हमरा नहि पता जे प्रधानमंत्री एतेक गंभीर मामला पर कोन संदर्भ मे बजलाह।

नेपाल–भारत सीमा विशेषज्ञ तथा प्रख्यात भूगोलविद बुद्धि नारायण श्रेष्ठ नेपालके भारतीय क्षेत्र अतिक्रमणके विषयमे प्रधानमन्त्रीके बयानके सेहो खारिज कएल गेल अछि ।

नेपाल कहियो भारतीय क्षेत्र अतिक्रमण नहि केलक आ ने सीमा क्षेत्र मे अपन कब्जा विस्तार नहि केलक । ओ कहलनि जे, किछु सीमावर्ती इलाका मे क्रॉस होल्डिंग कब्जा के कारण दुनू देश के किसान एक दोसरा के जमीन के उपयोग केने छथि।

एहि मासक शुरुआत मे नेपालक विदेश मन्त्रालयक प्रवक्ता लोकबहादुर क्षेत्री कूटनीतिक माध्यम सँ भारतक संग सीमा समस्याक समाधान लेल देश प्रतिबद्ध बतौलनि ।

कथा एहि विज्ञापनक नीचाँ जारी अछि

क्षेत्री केरऽ ई टिप्पणी भारत न॑ उत्तराखंड केरऽ लंबा समय स॑ स्थापित लिपुलेख दर्रा के माध्यम स॑ आगामी कैलाश मनसरोवर यात्रा प॑ नेपाल केरऽ आपत्ति क॑ दृढ़ता स॑ खारिज करी क॑ ई क्षेत्र प॑ काठमांडू केरऽ क्षेत्रीय दावा क॑ “एकतरफा कृत्रिम विस्तार” के रूप म॑ खारिज करला के कुछ दिन बाद आबी गेलऽ छेलै जेकरा नई दिल्ली क॑ “असहनीय” लगै छै ।

title: Nepal PM Balendra Shah’s Border Remarks Trigger Controversy and Public Outrage - Daily Pioneer
description: Nepal PM Balendra Shah’s Border Remarks Trigger Controversy and Public Outrage  Daily Pioneer
publisher.title: Daily Pioneer
full_article:
Nepal Prime Minister Balendra Shah has sparked controversy after stating in Parliament that not only has India allegedly encroached on Nepalese territory, but Nepal has also occupied Indian land in several places.

His remarks came during a discussion on the long-running border disputes involving Kalapani, Lipulekh, and Limpiyadhura, areas claimed by both countries.

Shah said Nepal and India have agreed to address the issue through dialogue involving historians, surveyors, and other experts.

He also revealed that Nepal has held diplomatic discussions with China and the United Kingdom, citing the historical role of British-era border arrangements in the dispute.

However, his comments quickly triggered criticism in Nepal. Opposition lawmakers and former diplomats questioned the basis of his claim that Nepal had encroached on Indian territory, arguing that no official records support such a position.

Several political leaders demanded clarification, while experts warned that statements on sensitive border issues should be backed by evidence.

The controversy comes amid renewed tensions over the Lipulekh Pass route used for the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra.

Nepal recently objected to India’s decision to resume the pilgrimage through the disputed region, while India rejected Kathmandu’s territorial claims and reiterated that the matter should be resolved through bilateral dialogue.
translated:
नेपालक प्रधानमन्त्री बलेन्द्र शाह संसदमे कहलाक बाद विवाद उत्पन्न कएने छथि जे भारत नेपाली क्षेत्रमे कथित अतिक्रमण मात्र नहि भेल अछि, नेपाल सेहो कतेको ठाम भारतीय भूमि पर कब्जा कएने अछि ।

हुनकऽ ई बात कालापानी, लिपुलेख, आरू लिम्पियाधुरा स॑ जुड़लऽ लंबा समय स॑ चलै वाला सीमा विवाद प॑ चर्चा के दौरान करलऽ गेलऽ छै, जेकरा प॑ दूनू देश के दावा छै ।

शाह कहलनि जे नेपाल आ भारत इतिहासकार, सर्वेयर, आ अन्य विशेषज्ञक संग संवादक माध्यमे एहि मुद्दा केँ संबोधित करबा पर सहमत भेल अछि।

विवाद मे ब्रिटिश युगक सीमा व्यवस्थाक ऐतिहासिक भूमिकाक उल्लेख करैत नेपाल चीन आ यूनाइटेड किंगडम सँ कूटनीतिक चर्चा केने सेहो खुलासा केलनि ।

मुदा, हुनकर एहि टिप्पणी स नेपाल मे जल्दीए आलोचना भड़कि गेल। विपक्षी विधायक आरू पूर्व राजनयिक न॑ हुनकऽ दावा के आधार प॑ सवाल उठैलकै कि नेपाल न॑ भारतीय क्षेत्र प॑ अतिक्रमण करलकै आरू ई तर्क देलकै कि कोय भी आधिकारिक रिकॉर्ड ऐन्हऽ स्थिति के समर्थन करै छै ।

कईटा राजनीतिक नेता स्पष्टीकरण क मांग केलथि, जखन कि विशेषज्ञ चेतावनी देलथि जे संवेदनशील सीमा मुद्दा पर बयान कए सबूत स समर्थन करबाक चाही।

कैलाश मनसरोवर यात्रा के लेल प्रयोग होबय वाला लिपुलेख दर्रा मार्ग के ल क ई विवाद फेर सं तनाव के बीच आबि रहल अछि.

नेपाल न॑ हाल ही म॑ भारत केरऽ विवादित क्षेत्र के माध्यम स॑ तीर्थयात्रा क॑ फेर स॑ शुरू करै के फैसला प॑ आपत्ति जतैलकै, जबकि भारत न॑ काठमांडू केरऽ क्षेत्रीय दावा क॑ खारिज करी क॑ दोहरैलकै कि ई मामला के समाधान द्विपक्षीय संवाद के माध्यम स॑ करलऽ जाय ।

title: Bangladesh lose 3-0 to India; Nepal await in semis - The Daily Star
description: Bangladesh lose 3-0 to India; Nepal await in semis  The Daily Star
publisher.title: The Daily Star
full_article:
The fierce rivalry between Bangladesh and India added another emotional chapter on Sunday as defending champions Bangladesh suffered a 3-0 defeat to hosts India in the final Group B match at the Pandit Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium in Goa.

googletag.cmd.push(function() { googletag.display('js-dfp-tag-en_photo_banner'); });

Despite the setback, Bangladesh advanced to the semifinals as Group B runners-up and will now face Group A champions Nepal -- a side they defeated in two previous finals to establish their regional supremacy.

For all latest news, follow The Daily Star's Google News channel.

India, eager to avenge successive defeats to Bangladesh in 2022 and 2023, produced an energetic display and were rewarded in the 36th minute when Pyari Xaxa capitalised on a miscued header from defender Kohati Kisku to break the deadlock.

googletag.cmd.push(function() { googletag.display('js-dfp-tag-en_three_special'); });

Peter Butler's side improved after the break and pushed forward in search of an equaliser, but their hopes suffered a major blow in the 73rd minute when substitute Lynda Kom Setro converted from the penalty spot after Surma Jannat brought down substitute Malavika inside the box. Malavika then completed the scoring in stoppage time with a simple tap-in.

googletag.cmd.push(function() { googletag.display('js-dfp-tag-en_four_banner'); });

The defeat ended Bangladesh's 10-match unbeaten run in the SAFF Women's Championship and marked a reversal of fortunes after they had beaten India 3-1 and 3-0 in their previous two meetings in the competition.

Butler made two changes to the side that defeated Maldives 4-2, bringing in Surma Jannat and Monika Chakma in place of Afeida Khandoker and Umehla Marma. Bangladesh started brightly and nearly took an early lead when Anika Rania Siddiqui's effort went straight to goalkeeper Panthoi Chanu.

After surviving that scare, India seized control of the contest. Bangladesh were forced onto the back foot as erratic passing and a lack of coordination in midfield disrupted their rhythm.

googletag.cmd.push(function() { googletag.display('js-dfp-tag-en_five_banner'); });

Stopper Surovi Akter Arfin stood out in defence, while goalkeeper Mile Akter denied the Indian forwards on several occasions to keep the scoreline respectable. However, defensive lapses from Kohati and Surma proved costly as India punished the mistakes to claim a deserved victory.

Bangladesh rarely threatened the Indian goal apart from brief spells at the start of each half, while the hosts could easily have won by a bigger margin had it not been for Mile's interventions.

२०२२ आरू २०२३ म॑ बांग्लादेश स॑ लगातार हार के बदला लेबै लेली बेताब भारत न॑ ऊर्जावान प्रदर्शन करलकै आरू ३६वां मिनट म॑ ओकरा पुरस्कृत करलऽ गेलै जब॑ प्यारी क्सक्सा न॑ डिफेंडर कोहाती किस्कू केरऽ गलत हेडर के फायदा उठाबैत॑ हुअ॑ गतिरोध तोड़ी देलकै ।

बटलर न॑ मालदीव क॑ ४-२ स॑ हराबै वाला टीम म॑ दू बदलाव करलकै, जेकरा म॑ अफीदा खंडोकर आरू उमेहला मरमा के जगह प॑ सुरमा जन्नत आरू मोनिका चकमा क॑ शामिल करलऽ गेलै । बंगलादेश न॑ शानदार शुरुआत करलकै आरू लगभग जल्दी बढ़त बनैलकै जब॑ अनिका रानिया सिद्दीकी केरऽ प्रयास सीधा गोलकीपर पंथोई चनु के पास गेलै ।

ओहि डर सं बचि गेलाक बाद भारत एहि प्रतियोगिता पर नियंत्रण जमा क लेलक। अव्यवस्थित पासिंग आरू मिडफील्ड म॑ समन्वय के कमी के वजह स॑ बंगलादेश क॑ बैक फुट प॑ बैठै लेली मजबूर करलऽ गेलै ।

स्टॉपर सुरोवी अक्टर अरफिन डिफेंस म॑ अलग नजर रखलकै, जबकि गोलकीपर माइल अक्टर न॑ कई बार भारतीय फोरवर्ड क॑ नकारतें हुअ॑ स्कोरलाइन क॑ सम्मानजनक रखलकै । लेकिन कोहाटी आरू सुरमा केरऽ रक्षात्मक चूक महंगा साबित होलै, कैन्हेंकि भारत न॑ गलती क॑ सजा द॑ क॑ हकदार जीत के दावा करलकै ।

हर हाफ के शुरूआत म॑ संक्षिप्त स्पेल के अलावा बांग्लादेश न॑ भारतीय गोल क॑ शायद ही कभी खतरा म॑ डाललकै, जबकि मेजबान टीम आसानी स॑ एकरा स॑ बड़ऽ अंतर स॑ जीत हासिल करी सकै छेलै अगर माइल केरऽ हस्तक्षेप नै होत॑ ।

title: BJP to host Nepal ruling party delegation in outreach to new govt. - The Hindu
description: BJP to host Nepal ruling party delegation in outreach to new govt.  The Hindu
publisher.title: The Hindu
full_article:
A five-member delegation of Nepal’s ruling party, the Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP), under the leadership of its chairperson Rabi Lamichhane, will visit India from Monday (June 1, 2026) at the specific invitation of BJP president Nitin Nabin.

A statement released by the BJP giving out details of this visit said Mr. Lamichhane and the delegation would be visiting the party headquarters and hold meeting with Mr. Nabin and senior BJP leaders. The visit of the delegation assumes significance as it comes days after the cancellation of Indian Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri’s proposed visit to Kathmandu. It is believed that Mr. Misri, who was due to visit Nepal on May 12 cancelled his visit after no assurance was forthcoming over a meeting with Nepal’s Prime Minister Balendra Shah.

Nepal has also encroached upon Indian territory, says PM Balendra Shah

The meeting between the two ruling parties of India and Nepal therefore is being viewed as an effort to increase the political conversation between New Delhi and Kathmandu.

“The visit seeks to initiate party-to-party engagement between the RSP and the BJP and provide an opportunity for exchange of views on organisational practices, democratic processes, and people-centric political outreach,” the BJP release said, adding that the party looked forward to a “constructive dialogue”.

Mr. Lamichhane will also be making a personal visit to Ayodhya during the trip to India, the RSP said in a statement. The other members of the delegation are Bipin Kumar Acharya (joint general secretary of RSP and member of the House of Representatives), Deepak Bohora (secretariat member and member of the House of Representatives), Nikita Poudel, and Pradip Acharya.

The visit also comes a day after Prime Minister Mr. Shah said Nepal too had encroached upon some Indian territories, an unprecedented claim made by any Nepali government.

A supermajority for RSP leaves Nepal’s Parliament with weakest Opposition

In the past, in 2022, Sher Bahadur Deuba became the first sitting Prime Minister of Nepal to visit the BJP headquarters in New Delhi, where he met then BJP president J.P. Nadda. Following that visit, former Prime Minister of Nepal, Pushpa Kamal Dahal (Prachanda), also visited the BJP headquarters in the same year.
translated:
नेपाल के सत्ताधारी दल राष्ट्रिय स्वतंत्र पार्टी के अध्यक्ष रबी लामिछाने के नेतृत्व में पांच सदस्यीय प्रतिनिधिमंडल भाजपा अध्यक्ष नितिन नबिन के विशिष्ट आमंत्रण पर सोमदिन (1 जून 2026) स भारत के दौरा करत।

भाजपा द्वारा जारी बयान मे एहि यात्राक विवरण दैत कहल गेल अछि जे श्री लामिछाने आ प्रतिनिधिमंडल पार्टी मुख्यालयक दौरा करताह आ श्री नबिन आ भाजपा के वरिष्ठ नेता सभ सं भेंट करताह. प्रतिनिधिमंडल केरऽ ई यात्रा महत्व ग्रहण करी रहलऽ छै, कैन्हेंकि ई भारतीय विदेश सचिव विक्रम मिश्री केरऽ काठमांडू केरऽ प्रस्तावित यात्रा रद्द होय के कुछ दिन बाद आबी रहलऽ छै । मानल जा रहल अछि जे नेपाल के प्रधानमंत्री बलेन्द्र शाह के संग भेल बैसार के लsक कोनो आश्वासन नहि मिलला के बाद 12 मई के नेपाल दौरा करय वाला श्री मिश्री अपन यात्रा रद्द क देलखिन्ह.

नेपाल सेहो भारतीय क्षेत्र अतिक्रमण केने अछि, पीएम बलेन्द्र शाह कहैत छथि

एहि लेल भारत आ नेपालक दुनू सत्ताधारी दलक बैसार केँ नई दिल्ली आ काठमांडूक बीच राजनीतिक गप्प बढेबाक प्रयासक रूप मे देखल जा रहल अछि ।

भाजपा केरऽ विज्ञप्ति म॑ कहलऽ गेलऽ छै कि ई यात्रा म॑ आरएसपी आरू भाजपा के बीच पार्टी-दल केरऽ जुड़ाव शुरू करै के कोशिश करलऽ गेलऽ छै आरू संगठनात्मक प्रथा, लोकतांत्रिक प्रक्रिया, आरू जन-केंद्रित राजनीतिक आउटरीच प॑ विचार के आदान-प्रदान के अवसर मिलै के कोशिश करलऽ गेलऽ छै ।

आरएसपी केरऽ बयान म॑ कहलऽ गेलऽ छै कि श्री लामिछाने भारत यात्रा के दौरान अयोध्या केरऽ व्यक्तिगत यात्रा भी करतै । प्रतिनिधिमंडल के अन्य सदस्य बिपिन कुमार आचार्य (रसपा के संयुक्त महासचिव आरू प्रतिनिधि सभा के सदस्य), दीपक बोहोरा (सचिवालय सदस्य आरू प्रतिनिधि सभा के सदस्य), निकिता पौडेल, आरू प्रदीप आचार्य छै ।

प्रधानमन्त्री श्री शाहके नेपाल सेहो किछु भारतीय क्षेत्रमे अतिक्रमण कएलक एक दिन बाद सेहो ई यात्रा भेल अछि, जे कोनो नेपाली सरकारके अभूतपूर्व दावा अछि ।

आरएसपी के लेल सुपरमेजोरिटी नेपाल के संसद मे सबस कमजोर विपक्ष के संग छोड़ि देलक अछि

पूर्व मे 2022 मे शेरबहादुर देउबा नेपालक पहिल बैसल प्रधानमंत्री बनलाह जे नई दिल्ली मे भाजपा मुख्यालय गेलाह, जतय ओ तत्कालीन भाजपा अध्यक्ष जे.पी. ओहि यात्राक बाद नेपालक पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री पुष्पकमल दाहाल (प्रचण्ड) सेहो ओही वर्ष भाजपा मुख्यालयक दौरा केलनि ।

title: Bangladesh set semi date against Nepal after losing to India - newagebd.net
description: Bangladesh set semi date against Nepal after losing to India  newagebd.net
publisher.title: newagebd.net
full_article:
An action from the SAFF Women’s Championship match between Bangladesh and India at the Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium in Goa, India on Sunday. | BFF photo

Bangladesh conceded a 3-0 defeat to India in their second and final Group B match of the SAFF Women’s Championship at the Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium in Goa, India on Sunday.

With the loss, Bangladesh finished as Group B runners-up and will face Group A champions Nepal in the first semi-final on Wednesday before Group B champions India play Bhutan in the other last four game on the same day.

Nepal emerged Group A champions with six points from two games after a 2-0 win over Sri Lanka in the day’s other match.



Bhutan, who suffered a 1-0 defeat to Nepal in their first match, also confirmed their semi-final berth with three points with a 4-0 win over eliminated side Sri Lanka on May 28.

In their Group B second and final match, Pyari Xaxa and super subs Lynda Kom and Malavika each scored once for five-time champions India.

Defending champions Bangladesh went 1-0 down in the 36th minute when Pyari’s right-footed drive from the box beat Bangladesh keeper Mile Akter following defender Kohati Kisku’s miscued attempt to clear a long ball.

Lynda doubled the margin by converting a penalty in the 77th minute, just 12 minutes after Bangladesh coach Peter Butler made three substitutions.

Bangladesh defender Surma Jannat brought down Malvika inside the box and the referee awarded a penalty to India.

Malvika added the final one in the first minute of the stoppage time as Bangladesh lost to India for the first time since March 2019, when Bangladesh were eliminated from the semi-finals after losing to India 4-0 in Nepal.

Afeida Khandokar was rested for the match while midfielder Monika Chakma returned to the side after recovering from injury.

Bangladesh who are looking to complete a hat-trick of titles by winning this edition after becoming unbeaten champions in 2022 and 2024 in Nepal, defeated Maldives 4-2 in their first match on May 28.

ई हार के साथ बांग्लादेश ग्रुप बी उपविजेता के रूप में खतम होय गेलऽ छै आरू बुधदिन पहिलऽ सेमीफाइनल में ग्रुप ए चैंपियन नेपाल के सामना करतै, जेकरा बाद ग्रुप बी चैंपियन भारत के साथ वू ही दिन अन्य आखिरी चार मैच में भूटान के साथ मैच होतै ।

दिन केरऽ दोसरऽ मैच म॑ श्रीलंका प॑ २-० स॑ जीत के बाद नेपाल दू मैचऽ स॑ ६ अंक के साथ ग्रुप ए चैंपियन बनलै ।



अपनऽ पहिलऽ मैच म॑ नेपाल स॑ १-० स॑ हार के शिकार भूटान न॑ भी २८ मई क॑ बाहर करलऽ गेलऽ श्रीलंका प॑ ४-० स॑ जीत हासिल करी क॑ तीन अंक के साथ सेमीफाइनल म॑ जगह बनाबै के पुष्टि करलकै ।

अपनऽ ग्रुप बी केरऽ दोसरऽ आरू अंतिम मैच म॑ प्यारी क्सक्सा आरू सुपर सब लिंडा कोम आरू मालविका न॑ पाँच बार के चैंपियन भारत केरऽ तरफ सें एक-एक गोल करलकै ।

डिफेंडिंग चैंपियन बांग्लादेश ३६वां मिनट म॑ १-० स॑ हार गेलै जब॑ डिफेंडर कोहाती किस्कू न॑ लम्बा गेंद क॑ क्लियर करै के गलत कोशिश के बाद बॉक्स स॑ प्यारी केरऽ दाहिना पैर स॑ ड्राइव करी क॑ बंगलादेश केरऽ कीपर माइल अक्टर क॑ हरा देलकै ।

बांग्लादेश केरऽ कोच पीटर बटलर न॑ तीन बदलाव के महज १२ मिनट बाद ७७वां मिनट म॑ पेनाल्टी क॑ गोल करी क॑ लिंडा न॑ अंतर क॑ दोगुना करी देलकै ।

बांग्लादेश केरऽ डिफेंडर सुरमा जन्नत न॑ मालविका क॑ बॉक्स के भीतर गिराय देलकै आरू रेफरी न॑ भारत क॑ पेनाल्टी देलकै ।

मालविका न॑ स्टॉप टाइम केरऽ पहलऽ मिनट म॑ अंतिम गोल जोड़लकै, कैन्हेंकि मार्च २०१९ के बाद पहलऽ बार बंगलादेश भारत स॑ हारलऽ छेलै, जब॑ नेपाल म॑ भारत स॑ ४-० स॑ हारला के बाद बंगलादेश सेमीफाइनल स॑ बाहर होय गेलऽ छेलै ।

अफेदा खंडोकर क॑ मैच लेली आराम देलऽ गेलै जबकि मिडफील्डर मोनिका चकमा चोट स॑ उबरला के बाद टीम म॑ वापस आबी गेलै ।

नेपाल म॑ २०२२ आरू २०२४ म॑ अपराजित चैंपियन बनला के बाद ई संस्करण जीती क॑ खिताब के हैट्रिक पूरा करै के कोशिश करी रहलऽ बांग्लादेश न॑ २८ मई क॑ अपनऽ पहलऽ मैच म॑ मालदीव क॑ ४-२ स॑ हरा देलकै ।

title: PM Shah's expression is related to Cross-Border Occupation: Foreign Ministry - The Rising Nepal
description: PM Shah's expression is related to Cross-Border Occupation: Foreign Ministry  The Rising Nepal
publisher.title: The Rising Nepal
full_article:
Kathmandu, May 31: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs has made it clear that Prime Minister Balendra Shah's remarks in today's Parliament on the Nepal-India boundary were related to encroachment of the no man's land and Cross-Border Occupation.

The Ministry made it clear regarding the remarks made by PM Shah in Parliament on the Nepal-India boundary stating a response of the Foreign Ministry Spokesperson to media queries.

"The adoption of the Fixed Boundary Principle in delineating the Nepal-India border along river boundary areas has led to 'Cross-Border Occupation' where the situation is that the citizens of one country farm and reside on land that falls within the territory of the other," according to the Ministry.

Likewise, the Ministry mentioned that border-related mechanisms and technical teams from both countries are active in collecting details of the Cross-Border Occupation, encroachment of no man's land, and construction and repair of border pillars in areas where mapping was done scientifically and systemically along the Nepal-India border.

The Ministry also stated that the job of the technical committee, which had remained pending for a long time, is active along the border area at present and details are being collected jointly.

The Foreign Ministry has clarified that PM Shah's recent remark in Parliament about land usage along the Nepal-India border that 'in some places, land currently used and occupied by Nepal may fall on the Indian side while land currently under India's use and occupation may lie on the Nepal's side', was made in the context of the technical findings identified by a study of the Technical Committee.

The findings had concluded that the issue is related to border management and 'cross-Border Occupation'.

The statement further explained that the Government of Nepal had already clarified its official position on India's operation of the Kailash Mansarovar pilgrimage route through the Nepali territory of the Lipulekh area on May 3 this year.

It also reminded Nepal's diplomatic note on the matter received a response from the Government of India through a diplomatic note as well.

The statement clarified that both countries have expressed their commitment to resolving border-related disputes through diplomatic channels and mutual dialogue.

The statement read, "It is evident that Nepal and India share a centuries-old, long, and open border. Nepal's current international boundary was demarcated and defined by the Treaty of Sugauli of 1816. Within the Nepal-India border, the areas of Susta and Limpiyadhura, Lipulekh and Kalapani remain to be demarcated."

The statement also noted that apart from these areas, the issues of 'cross-Border Occupation' and encroachment upon the no-man's land also persist in certain other locations." (RSS)
translated:
काठमांडू, ३१ मई, मिथिला मिरर: नेपाल-भारत सीमा पर आजुक संसदमे प्रधानमन्त्री बलेन्द्र शाहके टिप्पणी नो मैन भूमि अतिक्रमण आ सीमा पार कब्जासँ सम्बन्धित रहल विदेश मन्त्रालय स्पष्ट कएने अछि ।

पीएम शाह द्वारा संसद मे नेपाल-भारत सीमा पर विदेश मन्त्रालयक प्रवक्ताक मिडियाक जिज्ञासाक प्रतिक्रिया कहैत टिप्पणीक संबंध मे मन्त्रालय स्पष्ट केलक अछि ।

मंत्रालय के अनुसार, "नदी सीमा क्षेत्र के साथ नेपाल-भारत सीमा के रेखांकन में निश्चित सीमा सिद्धांत के अपनाबै के कारण 'सीमा पार कब्जा' के कारण बनल छै, जहां स्थिति ई छै कि एक देश के नागरिक दोसर के क्षेत्र में आबै वाला जमीन पर खेती करै छै आरू निवास करै छै।"

तहिना नेपाल-भारत सीमाक कात मे वैज्ञानिक आ प्रणालीगत रूप सँ मानचित्रण कयल गेल क्षेत्र मे सीमा पार क कब्जा, कोनो आदमीक जमीन पर अतिक्रमण, आ सीमा स्तम्भक निर्माण आ मरम्मत मे दुनू देशक सीमा सँ जुड़ल तंत्र आ तकनीकी टीम सक्रिय अछि ।

मंत्रालय न॑ ई भी बतैलकै कि बहुत दिन स॑ लंबित रहलऽ तकनीकी समिति केरऽ काम फिलहाल सीमा क्षेत्र के साथ सक्रिय छै आरू एकरऽ विवरण संयुक्त रूप स॑ एकत्रित करलऽ जाय रहलऽ छै ।

विदेश मंत्रालय न॑ स्पष्ट करलकै कि पीएम शाह केरऽ हाल म॑ संसद म॑ नेपाल-भारत सीमा के भूमि उपयोग के बारे म॑ जे टिप्पणी करलऽ गेलऽ छै कि ‘किछु जगहऽ प॑ वर्तमान म॑ नेपाल केरऽ उपयोग आरू कब्जा वाला जमीन भारतीय पक्ष म॑ पड़॑ सकै छै जबकि वर्तमान म॑ भारत केरऽ उपयोग आरू कब्जा वाला जमीन नेपाल के तरफ स॑ पड़॑ सकै छै’, तकनीकी समिति केरऽ अध्ययन स॑ चिन्हित तकनीकी निष्कर्ष के संदर्भ म॑ करलऽ गेलऽ छेलै ।

निष्कर्ष स॑ ई निष्कर्ष निकाललऽ गेलऽ छेलै कि ई मुद्दा सीमा प्रबंधन आरू ‘सीमा पार कब्जा’ स॑ जुड़लऽ छै ।

विज्ञप्तिमे आगू स्पष्ट कएल गेल अछि जे नेपाल सरकार एहि वर्ष ३ मईकेँ लिपुलेख क्षेत्रक नेपाली भूभाग होइत कैलाश मानसरोवर तीर्थमार्गक भारत द्वारा संचालन पर अपन आधिकारिक स्थिति स्पष्ट कएने अछि ।

संगहि ई मोन पाड़लक जे एहि विषय पर नेपालक कूटनीतिक नोट केँ भारत सरकार सँ कूटनीतिक नोटक माध्यम सँ सेहो प्रतिक्रिया भेटल छल ।

बयान मँ स्पष्ट करलौ गेलौ छै कि दोनों देश नँ कूटनीतिक चैनल आरू आपसी संवाद के माध्यम स॑ सीमा स॑ जुड़लऽ विवाद के समाधान के प्रतिबद्धता जतैन॑ छै ।

बयान में कहल गेल छल, "ई स्पष्ट अछि जे नेपाल आ भारत के बीच सदियो पुरान, लंबा आ खुला सीमा अछि। नेपाल के वर्तमान अंतर्राष्ट्रीय सीमा के सीमांकन आ परिभाषित कयल गेल छल 1816 के सुगौली संधि द्वारा। नेपाल-भारत सीमा के भीतर सुस्ता आ लिम्पियाधुरा, लिपुलेख आ कालापानी के क्षेत्र के सीमांकन बाकी अछि।"

बयान म॑ ई भी कहलऽ गेलऽ छै कि ई क्षेत्रऽ के अलावा ‘सीमा पार कब्जा’ आरू नो-मैन के जमीन प॑ अतिक्रमण के मुद्दा कुछ अन्य स्थानऽ प॑ भी कायम छै ।’’ (आरएसएस)

title: Nepal's Prime Minister Sparks Debate Over Alleged Border Encroachments - Devdiscourse
description: Nepal's Prime Minister Sparks Debate Over Alleged Border Encroachments  Devdiscourse
publisher.title: Devdiscourse
full_article:
In a recent parliamentary session, Nepal's Prime Minister Balendra Shah ignited a debate by asserting that Nepal has encroached on territories within India, and vice versa. His statements aimed at addressing long-standing border disputes inadvertently provoked political controversy.

Shah mentioned that both nations have agreed to seek guidance from historians and experts to resolve these issues diplomatically. The contentious areas include Lipulekh, Limpiyadhura, and Kalapani, which are claimed by both countries. Interestingly, hours after Shah's remarks, Nepal's Foreign Ministry clarified that his comments pertained to 'no-man's land' and cross-border occupation, not territorial claims.

The Prime Minister's comments were met with backlash from opposition lawmakers and former Nepalese diplomats, who expressed skepticism over the claims of mutual encroachments. They stressed the need for supporting evidence or retraction of his statement. Former diplomats argued against the notion of Nepal encroaching on Indian territories, pointing out that past disputes have been largely resolved.

Despite the uproar, Shah emphasized the importance of reviewing historical facts in concert with neighboring countries to amicably settle the disputes. Coinciding with these developments, a delegation from the ruling Rastriya Swatantra Party is scheduled to visit India for political and diplomatic discussions.

(With inputs from agencies.)
translated:
हाल के संसदीय सत्र में नेपाल के प्रधानमंत्री बलेन्द्र शाह नेपाल भारत के भीतर के इलाका में अतिक्रमण केने छै, आरू एकरऽ विपरीत भी ई बात के दावा करी क॑ बहस के भड़का देलकै । लंबा समय स सीमा विवाद कए दूर करबाक उद्देश्य स हुनकर बयान अनजाने मे राजनीतिक विवाद कए भड़का देलक।

शाह न॑ ई बात के जिक्र करलकै कि ई सब मुद्दा क॑ कूटनीतिक तरीका स॑ समाधान करै लेली इतिहासकार आरू विशेषज्ञऽ स॑ मार्गदर्शन लेली दूनू राष्ट्र सहमत होय गेलऽ छै । विवादित क्षेत्र मे लिपुलेख, लिम्पियाधुरा, आ कालापानी शामिल अछि, जाहि पर दुनू देशक दावा अछि । मजेदार बात ई छै कि शाह केरऽ टिप्पणी के घंटों बाद नेपाल केरऽ विदेश मंत्रालय न॑ स्पष्ट करलकै कि हुनकऽ टिप्पणी क्षेत्रीय दावा स॑ नै, बल्कि ‘कोनो आदमी के जमीन’ आरू सीमा पार स॑ कब्जा स॑ संबंधित छै ।

प्रधानमंत्री केरऽ ई टिप्पणी प॑ विपक्षी विधायक आरू पूर्व नेपाली राजनयिकऽ के प्रतिक्रिया मिललै, जेकरा म॑ आपसी अतिक्रमण के दावा प॑ संदेह व्यक्त करलऽ गेलै । ओ सब हुनकर बयान के समर्थन करय वाला सबूत या वापस लेबय के जरूरत पर जोर देलखिन्ह. पूर्व राजनयिक लोकनि नेपाल भारतीय क्षेत्र अतिक्रमण करबाक धारणा के खिलाफ तर्क दैत पूर्व विवादक बहुत हद तक समाधान भ गेल अछि ।

हंगामा के बावजूद शाह न॑ पड़ोसी देशऽ के साथ मिल क॑ ऐतिहासिक तथ्यऽ के समीक्षा करी क॑ विवादऽ के सौहार्दपूर्ण तरीका स॑ निपटारा करै के महत्व प॑ जोर देलकै । ई सब घटनाक्रम के साथ संयोग स॑ सत्तारूढ़ राष्ट्रिय स्वतंत्र पार्टी केरऽ प्रतिनिधिमंडल राजनीतिक आरू कूटनीतिक चर्चा लेली भारत केरऽ दौरा करै वाला छै ।

(एजेंसियों के इनपुट के साथ।)

title: Nepal's RSP Delegation Plans India Visit - Devdiscourse
description: Nepal's RSP Delegation Plans India Visit  Devdiscourse
publisher.title: Devdiscourse
full_article:
Nepal's Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP) is set to send a delegation to India at the start of June. This visit, led by party head Rabi Lamichhane, is on the invitation of Bharatiya Janata Party president Nitin Nabin, as announced by the BJP on Sunday.

The delegation intends to have discussions with Nabin and other prominent BJP figures during their stay in New Delhi. According to Vijay Chauthaiwale, who heads the BJP's foreign affairs segment, the visit aims to establish a framework for party-to-party engagement, facilitating discussions on organisational strategies, democratic processes, and public engagement.

Chauthaiwale remarked, "The Bharatiya Janata Party eagerly anticipates welcoming the delegation and engaging in meaningful conversations."

(With inputs from agencies.)
translated:
नेपालके राष्ट्रिय स्वतन्त्र पार्टी जूनके प्रारंभमे भारतमे एक प्रतिनिधि मंडल पठाबऽ जा रहल अछि । पार्टी प्रमुख रबी लामिछाने के नेतृत्व में आयोजित ई यात्रा भारतीय जनता पार्टी के अध्यक्ष नितिन नबिन के आमंत्रण पर भेल अछि, जेकर घोषणा रविदिन भाजपा केने अछि.

प्रतिनिधिमंडल के इरादा अछि जे नबी दिल्ली मे रहय के दौरान नबिन आओर भाजपा के दोसर प्रमुख हस्ती सं बातचीत होए. भाजपा के विदेश क्षेत्र के प्रमुख विजय चौथाईवाले के अनुसार ई यात्रा के उद्देश्य पार्टी-दल के जुड़ाव के रूपरेखा स्थापित करना छै, जेकरा स॑ संगठनात्मक रणनीति, लोकतांत्रिक प्रक्रिया, आरू जन-संलग्नता के बारे म॑ चर्चा के सुविधा मिलै छै ।

चौथैवाले न॑ टिप्पणी करलकै कि भारतीय जनता पार्टी प्रतिनिधिमंडल के स्वागत आरू सार्थक बातचीत म॑ शामिल होय के बेसब्री स॑ प्रतीक्षा करी रहलऽ छै ।
